scripts.build:app: pnpm -s prepare:resources && pnpm --filter @tuanchat/web run build && pnpm -s sync:web-build && pnpm -s compile
scripts.build: pnpm -s build:app && pnpm exec electron-builder build --config electron-builder.json
scripts.build:win:zip: pnpm -s build:app && pnpm exec electron-builder build --config electron-builder.json --win zip
scripts.build:win:nsis: pnpm -s build:app && pnpm exec electron-builder build --config electron-builder.json --win nsis
scripts.build:mac:zip: pnpm -s build:app && pnpm exec electron-builder build --config electron-builder.json --mac zip
scripts.build:mac:dmg: pnpm -s build:app && pnpm exec electron-builder build --config electron-builder.json --mac dmg
